title: read_note
description: Read an Obsidian note's content, frontmatter, metadata, and statistics. Returns parsed markdown, YAML frontmatter, tags, links, and file info.

path.description: Note path relative to vault root (e.g. 'Daily/2026-03-12.md')

include_frontmatter.description: Parse and return YAML frontmatter as structured object

include_links.description: Extract and return all outgoing links

include_tags.description: Extract and return all tags (frontmatter + inline)

include_stats.description: Include word count, character count, reading time

section.description: Return only a specific heading section (e.g. '## Summary')
